ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the player's profile */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the player is currently active */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Birth place of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played in the season */,
  "year_from" INTEGER /* Year the season started */,
  "year_to" INTEGER /* Year the season ended */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player played for */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "minutes" REAL /* Total minutes played */,
  "fg_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "ft_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" REAL /* Total assists */,
  "steals" REAL /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Total blocks */,
  "points" REAL /* Total points */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Coach of the team */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Arena the team played in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  "established" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "player_award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award won */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_season" TEXT /* Season the award was won in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who earned the salary */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the salary was earned */,
  "salary" REAL /* Amount of the salary */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Total value of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advanced metric */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the metric was achieved */,
  "per" REAL /* Player Efficiency Rating (PER) */,
  "ws" REAL /* Win Shares (WS) */,
  "ws48" REAL /* Win Shares per 48 minutes (WS/48) */,
  "bpm" REAL /* Box Plus/Minus (BPM) */,
  "vorp" REAL /* Value Over Replacement Player (VORP) */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True Shooting Percentage (TS%) */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective Field Goal Percentage (eFG%) */,
  "offensive_rebound_percentage" REAL /* Offensive Rebound Percentage (ORB%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_metrics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_advanced_metrics" (
  "season_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season advanced metric */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the metric was achieved in */,
  "per" REAL /* Player Efficiency Rating (PER) */,
  "ws" REAL /* Win Shares (WS) */,
  "ws48" REAL /* Win Shares per 48 minutes (WS/48) */,
  "bpm" REAL /* Box Plus/Minus (BPM) */,
  "vorp" REAL /* Value Over Replacement Player (VORP) */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True Shooting Percentage (TS%) */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective Field Goal Percentage (eFG%) */,
  "offensive_rebound_percentage" REAL /* Offensive Rebound Percentage (ORB%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_advanced_metrics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played in the season */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season played */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Total minutes played in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_teams" (
  "season_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the team played in */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_teams_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was drafted */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted at */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (analyst, executive, agent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
